panels.title: Per-minute total events (raw pipeline check — whatever scenario is currently loaded)

targets.rawSql: SELECT window_start AS time, sum(cnt) AS total_events FROM lab.minute_counts WHERE item_id NOT IN ('_flush','_hb') GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: CORRECT top-$k — sum(cnt) over trailing $window, ranked

targets.rawSql: WITH bounds AS (SELECT max(window_end) AS end_ts FROM lab.minute_counts WHERE item_id NOT IN ('_flush','_hb')) SELECT item_id, sum(cnt) AS correct_total FROM lab.minute_counts WHERE item_id NOT IN ('_flush','_hb') AND window_start >= (SELECT end_ts FROM bounds) - INTERVAL $window MINUTE AND window_start < (SELECT end_ts FROM bounds) GROUP BY item_id ORDER BY correct_total DESC LIMIT $k

panels.title: NAIVE top-$k — merge each minute's own top-$retain, ranked

targets.rawSql: WITH bounds AS (SELECT max(window_end) AS end_ts FROM lab.minute_counts WHERE item_id NOT IN ('_flush','_hb')), minute_ranked AS (SELECT window_start, item_id, cnt, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY window_start ORDER BY cnt DESC) AS rn FROM lab.minute_counts WHERE item_id NOT IN ('_flush','_hb') AND window_start >= (SELECT end_ts FROM bounds) - INTERVAL $window MINUTE AND window_start < (SELECT end_ts FROM bounds)) SELECT item_id, sum(cnt) AS naive_total FROM minute_ranked WHERE rn <= $retain GROUP BY item_id ORDER BY naive_total DESC LIMIT $k

WITH bounds AS (SELECT max(window_end) AS end_ts FROM lab.minute_counts WHERE item_id NOT IN ('_flush','_hb')), ranked AS (SELECT item_id, sum(cnt) AS total, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY sum(cnt) DESC) AS rnk FROM lab.minute_counts WHERE item_id NOT IN ('_flush','_hb') AND window_start >= (SELECT end_ts FROM bounds) - INTERVAL $window MINUTE AND window_start < (SELECT end_ts FROM bounds) GROUP BY item_id) SELECT rnk AS sleeper_correct_rank FROM ranked WHERE item_id = 'sleeper'

panels.title: 'sleeper' — NAIVE total (0 = invisible to naive merge)

targets.rawSql: WITH bounds AS (SELECT max(window_end) AS end_ts FROM lab.minute_counts WHERE item_id NOT IN ('_flush','_hb')), minute_ranked AS (SELECT window_start, item_id, cnt, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY window_start ORDER BY cnt DESC) AS rn FROM lab.minute_counts WHERE item_id NOT IN ('_flush','_hb') AND window_start >= (SELECT end_ts FROM bounds) - INTERVAL $window MINUTE AND window_start < (SELECT end_ts FROM bounds)) SELECT sum(cnt) AS sleeper_naive_total FROM minute_ranked WHERE rn <= $retain AND item_id = 'sleeper'
